title: Personalized Onboarding Experience Based on User-Selected Solutions
story: As a new DataTools Pro user, I want a personalized onboarding experience based on the solutions I selected during sign-up, so that I can quickly get started with the features most relevant to my needs.
description:
Review and enhance the onboarding experience so that new users are guided based on their interests. During sign-up, users select their preferred starting points:

1. Explore objects in a dictionary
2. Visualize objects in an ERD
3. Learn about metrics glossary

The selected solutions from the web-to-lead form are sent to the REST API during OTP generation. After successful authentication, the solutions are retrieved and stored on the user model. A personalized welcome popup is shown to new customers based on their saved solution preferences.

The goal is to connect the web-to-lead form data (role and selected solutions) to customize the initial in-app experience.
acceptance_criteria: User-selected solutions from the beta sign-up form are sent to the REST API during OTP generation
Solutions are stored in the dtp_signup database table
Upon successful OTP authentication, solutions are transferred to the users model
A personalized welcome popup is displayed to new users based on their saved solutions
The welcome popup is only shown to new customers, not returning users
Users can start with Dictionary, ERD, or Metrics Glossary based on their selection
ux_changes: A personalized welcome popup is shown to new customers after first login, guiding them to their selected solutions (Dictionary, ERD, or Metrics Glossary).
middleware_changes: Updated the OTP generation flow to accept and pass solution selections from the beta form. Updated authentication flow to retrieve solutions from dtp_signup and save them to the user model.
data_model_changes: Added solutions field to the `dtp_signup` table. Added solutions field to the `users` model to persist the user's onboarding preferences.
api_changes: REST API updated to accept solution selections during OTP generation. Solutions are included in the sign-up payload.
implementation_notes: Solutions are captured during the beta form sign-up, stored in dtp_signup, then transferred to the user record upon successful authentication. The welcome popup logic checks if the user is new and displays personalized content accordingly.
comment_summary: Developer implemented the solution: sign-up form selections flow through the API to dtp_signup, then to the user model on auth. A personalized welcome popup was built for new customers. Screenshot provided for review.
